title: LibZ Rework
description: This mod is a rework for Minecraft version 1.21.11 by LibZ (a library mod for some Globox_Z mods and for Player Level Skills).
body:
This mod is a rework for Minecraft version 1.21.11 by LibZ (a library mod for some [Globox1997](https://modrinth.com/user/Globox1997) mods and for Player Level Skills).

![LibZ Rework Tabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b6c543b4009064fb63af3538c2ed698ff3f23d9.png)
All credit for the creation of the mod belongs to [Globox1997](https://modrinth.com/user/Globox1997); visit his mods.

It adds tab registration for tabs visible on the screen.

Requires Fabric-API and Cloth Config (edit)

This mod was developed for Fabric.

Modpack Permission:

Feel free to use it in any modpack.
